title: Phase 3 Deep Operations End-To-End Flow
description: Demonstrates decision debt pricing, consequence verification scheduling, falsification on contradiction, and authority preservation

phase_1_governed_memory_write.summary: Commitment made to deliver Q3 roadmap without execution owner identified

calculationBasis: mandate issued but no verification checkpoint
prior similar case took 8 weeks to resolve

estimatedFinancialRange.basis: £2500/week × 18-32 weeks delay, based on historical execution fractures

phase_2_decision_debt_creation.result: ✓ Decision debt recorded with framework alignment and audit locks

phase_3_audit_lock_applied.result: ✓ Source events audit-locked (decay-protected, cannot be mutated)
phase_3_audit_lock_applied.decayPolicy: Source event will not be compressed or deleted while linked to debt

phase_4_consequence_verification_schedul.originalWarning: Q3 roadmap commitment without execution owner is at critical risk
phase_4_consequence_verification_schedul.expectedOutcome: Q3 roadmap delivery will slip OR execution owner will be assigned within 2 weeks
phase_4_consequence_verification_schedul.result: ✓ Verification scheduled (original warning audit-locked, append-only outcome ready)

phase_5_outcome_verification_later.expectedOutcome: Q3 roadmap delivery will slip OR execution owner will be assigned within 2 weeks
phase_5_outcome_verification_later.actualOutcome: Q3 roadmap was delayed 12 weeks; execution owner still not assigned at verification date
phase_5_outcome_verification_later.outcomeSummary: Warning proved accurate. No action taken to assign owner. Situation deteriorated.
phase_5_outcome_verification_later.result: ✓ Outcome APPENDED (original warning PRESERVED, not mutated)

phase_6_falsification_not_triggered_here.note: In this case, outcome matched warning (verified_deteriorated, not contradicted). Falsification would be triggered if outcome contradicted warning.

example_falsification.originalWarning: Board will reject proposal if not approved by Q3
example_falsification.actualOutcome: Board approved proposal with minor modifications in Q4
example_falsification.calibrationNotes: Underestimated board flexibility on timeline. Will increase timeline buffer 3-4 weeks in similar scenarios.

phase_7_original_warning_preserved.originalWarning: Q3 roadmap commitment without execution owner is at critical risk
phase_7_original_warning_preserved.result: ✓ Original warning preserved in audit trail (cannot be erased or rewritten)

phase_8_decision_debt_flagged_for_review.reason: Verification confirmed deterioration. Decision debt increased due to prolonged non-resolution.
phase_8_decision_debt_flagged_for_review.nextAction: Review execution owner assignment process. Increase escalation triggers.
phase_8_decision_debt_flagged_for_review.result: ✓ Decision debt UPDATED (not deleted, append recorded)

system_proved: Decision debt prices unresolved contradictions (£45k–£80k estimated cost)
Decision debt requires framework alignment and calculation basis
Consequence verification scheduled warnings for later testing
Falsification path records system errors (if contradiction detected)
Original warnings are preserved under audit lock
No mutation or deletion of source evidence
summary.conclusion: Phase 3 deep operations system successfully records, prices, verifies, falsifies, and preserves evidence without granting authority.
